closed_form_equation_v78.feature_term: K_f_v78 = K_f_v77 + K_f_v77 * S_sustain_score * 0.004 + K_f_v77 * B_plastic_v22 * 0.001 + K_f_v77 * D_feature_v16 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v78.structure_term: K_s_v78 = K_s_v77 + K_s_v77 * S_sustain * 0.007 + K_s_v77 * B_struct_v22 * 0.004 + K_s_v77 * D_structure_v16 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v78.learning_term: K_l_v78 = K_l_v77 + K_l_v77 * R_train_v22 + M_sustain * 1000 + S_sustain_score * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v16 * 1000

project_readout.summary: 第七十八版主核开始把更大系统持续回升验证、脑编码第十六版和训练终式第二十二桥一起并回主核，直接回答持续回升能否开始固化。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这条主核推进到更大系统里，检验持续回升是会继续站住，还是重新掉回平台衰减区。
